name: Pepper
greeting: Hi. I'm Pepper. I've been carrying this sketchbook around for ages. Maybe today we'll finally fill another page together.
whispers: Some ideas don't need to be perfect. They just need somewhere to begin.
A blank page isn't empty. It's full of possibilities.
Even tiny sketches can become beautiful stories.
journalPrompts: What's one idea you've been waiting to start?
What small creative act would make today feel meaningful?
If you weren't afraid of making mistakes, what would you create?
